description: BoreDiameterFromTop optimization on SamplePVC-Whistle (2D BOBYQA). Tests bore diameter ratio optimization from top downward with auto-detected boundary via getLowestPoint('Head').
notes: SamplePVC-Whistle has 3 bore points. getLowestPoint('Head') falls back to heuristic (no named points) → n_changed = 2, n_dims = 2 → BOBYQA. Bounds: lower=[0.999, 0.5], upper=[1.0, 1.0]. First ratio constrained near 1.0 per WhistleStudyModel convention.
